CVE-2020-28491.title: This affects the package com.fasterxml.jackson.dataformat:jackson ...
CVE-2020-28491.summary: This affects the package com.fasterxml.jackson.dataformat:jackson-dataformat-cbor from 0 and before 2.11.4, from 2.12.0-rc1 and before 2.12.1. Unchecked allocation of byte buffer can cause a java.lang.OutOfMemoryError exception.
